drug_name: Symmetry Foaming Hand Sanitizer-Fragrance Free with Aloe and Vitamin E
indications_and_usage: Uses Hand sanitizer to help reduce bacteria on the skin that could cause disease Recommended for repeated use
adverse_reactions: If irritation or rash appears and persists, stop use and see a physician.
dosage_and_administration: Directions Dispense an adequate amount of hand sanitizer Rub hands together until completely dry
